name: PID Joint Tuning Study
description: Perform a systematic PID gain tuning study on a robot arm joint in CoppeliaSim by testing at least 8 distinct gain combinations, varying P (0.1 to 5.0), I (0.0 to 0.5), and D (0.0 to 1.0). Connect to the simulation via the ZMQ Remote API on port 23000. For each combination, evaluate the transient response to a step input (e.g., 0° to 45°) by calculating overshoot (%), settling time (s), steady-state error (deg), and rise time (s). Record the results for all trials in /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/pid_tuning_data.csv with columns for trial_id, kp, ki, kd, overshoot_pct, settling_time_s, rise_time_s, and steady_state_error_deg. Recommend the best-performing gain set in a summary report at /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/pid_tuning_report.json including the joint_name, total_trials, step_size_deg, best_trial_id, best_kp, best_ki, best_kd, best_overshoot_pct, best_settling_time_s, and selection_criterion.
